faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Longwood homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies in Longwood properties are typically caused by organic buildup in drains, pipes, and sewer lines. Older plumbing systems common in Bronx buildings create ideal breeding conditions. Standing water, food residue, and biofilm in drains provide the perfect environment for drain fly larvae to develop and multiply rapidly.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Longwood take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and the number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, apply targeted treatments, and provide recommendations to prevent future issues. You'll typically see significant reduction within 2-3 days.
